chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1428 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 6043/23 3.For hearing of main case. 21-02-2024 Petitioner is present in person. M/s Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G and Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G a/w Inspector Sheeraz of P.S, Ghotki and SIP Jamsher Ali, P.S, Wasti Jiwan Shah. ***** Learned APG has filed statements on behalf of respondent No.3 and submits that after due investigation, the case has been disposed of under C-class and such summary report has been accepted by the Magistrate. The SSP, Ghotki has also filed report in terms of last order. Since the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed and the case against him has been disposed of under C-class, this petition having served its purpose is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. However, if the petitioner has any grievance yet, he may approach the relevant forum for redressal of the same. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
